## Checklist

- [ ] I edited the **design system** (`src/`), not generated artifacts.
- [ ] `npm run build` run; regenerated `themes/` and `package.json` committed.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (no drift).
- [ ] `npm run audit` passes (within the comfort envelope).
- [ ] Eyeballed with `npm run preview` (and in-editor for non-trivial changes).
